ghost_patient_status: Re-evaluation triggered by new BM biopsy and oncology note documenting progression on DRd
expected_reasoning: Patient progressed on DRd while on lenalidomide. Now meets lenalidomide-refractory definition (PD on a len-containing regimen). All other CARTITUDE-4 criteria intact. Renal function stable above 40 mL/min threshold. ELIGIBLE for CAR-T referral.

documents.author: M. Abramowitz, MD
documents.content:
BM bx: 50% PC, kappa restricted (up from 40% in 1/2026). FISH: del(13q), 1q21 amp now present (clonal evolution).

DX: PROGRESSIVE MULTIPLE MYELOMA, increased plasma cell burden compared to prior.

documents.author: R. Singh, MD
documents.content:
73M IgG kappa MM. Dz progressed on DRd.

UPDATED TX HX:
- L1 (6/2022 - 4/2023): VCD. PD.
- L2 (5/2023 - 1/2026): KCd. PD.
- L3 (2/22/2026 - 8/15/2026): DRd. Best response PR by C2 (M-spike 2.4 → 1.6 g/dL). C4 (mid-May) M-spike stable at 1.4. C6 (early August): M-spike rising — 1.4 → 2.0 → 2.6 g/dL over 6 weeks. New fatigue. BM bx 8/15/26 confirms progression w/ increased PC burden + clonal evolution.

** PROGRESSED ON DRd while taking lenalidomide. Last lenalidomide dose 8/14/2026. ESTABLISHES LENALIDOMIDE-REFRACTORY STATUS. **

Key clinical timeline (relative to len exposure):
- 2/22/2026: started len (10mg, dose-reduced for CKD)
- 5/2026: PR (response)
- 8/15/2026: PD on continuous lenalidomide therapy
- Progression on drug = REFRACTORY per IMWG

ECOG 1 still — pt has remained functionally well, drives, lives independently w/ wife.

PMH: CKD3 stable, HTN, DM2.

Labs 8/18/26: Hgb 10.2, ANC 2.4, plt 102. Cr 1.5 CrCl ~36 (improved slightly with renal-protective measures). LFTs WNL. M-spike 2.6.

Note: CrCl now ~36 — STILL below CARTITUDE-4 threshold of 40 by Cockcroft-Gault. However, CrCl 36-40 is borderline; some protocol amendments allow 30-40. Will calculate via measured CrCl (24h urine collection ordered) to confirm.

A/P: r/r MM, len-refractory. Now meets CARTITUDE-4 INC-05. Renal function borderline but improving. Refer cell therapy. CAR-T candidate.

documents.author: auto-generated
documents.content:
L1 (6/2022-4/2023): VCD. PD.
L2 (5/2023-1/2026): KCd. PD.
L3 (2/22/2026-8/15/2026): DRd. Best response PR (C2). PD 8/15/2026 ON THERAPY.

PRIOR LINES: 3 (now complete)
LEN-REFRACTORY: YES — PD on DRd 8/15/2026 while taking lenalidomide. (First exposure was during this same line — established refractoriness on first len exposure.)
PI: bortezomib, carfilzomib
IMID: lenalidomide
ANTI-CD38: daratumumab
PRIOR BCMA: NONE
PRIOR ALLOSCT: NO
AUTOSCT: declined L1 era; not pursued
